features.featureTitle: In the frontend Settings page (SettingsPage.tsx), update the owner-check logic that gates the Settings screen. The frontend isOwner check must compare the authenticated Internet Identity principal against the hardcoded string 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'. Do not rely solely on a backend role query that could return a stale or missing result. If the backend getMyRole (or equivalent) query is used, also verify locally. The Settings screen must render fully for the owner principal.
